examples: The "five poisons" were thought to be cinnabar, realgar, chalcanthite, alum, and magnetite.
Superparamagnetic magnetite nanoparticles were surface-modified with lactobionic acid (LA) to improve their intracellular uptake and ability to target hepatocytes.
The black rock was later named as magnetite, perhaps after Magnesia or magnes and further work by Greek and Chinese gave emergence to magnet.
